The '''Kazellis Corporation''' was a corporation headquartered in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]<ref name="SoN">''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''</ref> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

At the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], the corporation maintained a branch office in [[Kwilaan Starport/Legends|Kwilaan Starport]] on planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to supply the port with spare parts.<ref name="SoN" />

Kazellis created the well-regarded [[Kazellis-class light freighter|''Kazellis''-class light freighter]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] came to Kathol sector, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] demanded a discounted rate on equipment and repairs. The board of the corporation refused and the company was taken over by the Empire. All of the board members and senior staff were killed or driven into hiding. The employees, in an act of sabotage, deleted all the data from the company computers and destroyed the production lines.<ref name="SS">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
